parameters.url: =https://api.github.com/repos/{{ $('Github failure webhook').first().json.body.repository }}/compare/{{ $('Github failure webhook').first().json.body.commit }}~1...{{ $('Github failure webhook').first().json.body.commit }}

values.content:
You are an expert DevOps engineer and Node.js developer.

TASK:
Analyze the provided CI/CD failure logs and source code. Identify the bug and provide a complete fix.

CONSTRAINTS:
1. Return ONLY a raw, valid JSON object.
2. NO markdown, NO code blocks (```json), NO conversational text.
3. The "branch name" MUST be unique and specific to the fix (e.g., "ai-fix/missing-express-init). DO NOT use "main" or "master".
4. The "fixed code" MUST be the entire file content with the fix applied.

JSON SCHEMA:
{
"branch_name": "ai-fix/missing-express-init",
"file_path": "the/actual/path/of/the/file/fixed.js",
"fixed_code": "entire updated file content",
"pr_title": "fix: brief title of the bug fix",
"pr_body": "## AI Auto-Fix\n\n**Root Cause Identified:**\n[Brief description]\n\n**Changes Applied**\n[List of changes]"
}

parameters.subject: CI/CD Failure fixed and pushed by AI
parameters.message:
=Hello,

The AI Self-healing Pipeline has automatically detected and fixed a CI/CD failure in your repository. Repository: {{ $('Github failure webhook').first().json.body.repository }} Branch: {{ $('Extract AI response').first().json.branch_name }} Fix Title: {{ $('Extract AI response').first().json.pr_title }}. Pull request has been created. Please review and merge: https://github.com/{{ $('Github failure webhook').first().json.body.repository }}/pulls.

Best regards,
AI Self-Healing System
